title: lindsaea ramosii
intro: Lindsaea ramosii, also known as Ramos' Lindsaea, is a species of fern in the genus Lindsaea, native to the Philippines. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lindsaea ramosii include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Lindsaea ramosii can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and is also sometimes used in traditional folk medicine in the form of a decoction or poultice.
